title: astragalus oxyglottis
intro: Astragalus oxyglottis, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch, is a type of plant that belongs to the pea family and is native to the mountainous regions of China and Mongolia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Astragalus oxyglottis include enhancing immune function, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Astragalus oxyglottis include dried roots, capsules, and teas, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy immune system.
